title: AI Marketing Intelligence Professional
mode: Self Learning + Campaign Lab + Mentor Strategy Validation

programOverview.objective: Train engineers to build AI-driven marketing decision systems: campaign intelligence, personalization, attribution, and social listening, with deployable automation and dashboards.
forWho: Product owners at startups and SMEs seeking growth automation
keyOutcomes: Implement segmentation, recommendation and uplift models for campaigns
Automate content workflows and campaign scheduling
Build real-time/near-real-time marketing dashboards and campaign orchestration hooks
Deploy marketing automation that integrates with CRM / mail systems

responsibilities: Critique content and AB test design
Ensure campaign systems are deployable and instrumented for measurement

curriculum.title: Marketing Data Foundations & Funnel Intelligence
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Identify at least 2 actionable funnel improvements.

curriculum.title: AI Content Automation & Campaign Scripting
coreObjectives: Use AI for campaign content generation
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Content variations must show performance difference.

curriculum.title: Campaign Intelligence & A/B Automation
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Test must show clear decision outcome.

curriculum.title: SEO Analytics & Social Sentiment AI
coreObjectives: Extract marketing insights from text data

curriculum.title: Customer Segmentation & Behavioral AI
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Each segment must have actionable marketing plan.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project & Marketing System Deployment
curriculum.evaluationCheckpoint: Project must show measurable CTR or conversion lift.

capstone.objective: Design and deploy a marketing intelligence system that measurably improves a campaign metric (CTR, conversion, LTV, retention) or demonstrates uplift via experiment simulation.
requirements: Problem selection (personalization, attribution, uplift, social listening)
End-to-end pipeline: data ingestion → model → campaign integration → measurement
A/B test or uplift estimation plan and results (real or simulated)
Deployment plan for integration with CRM/marketing tool
deliverables: GitHub repo with code, data samples, and deployment notes
Slide deck & recorded demo suitable for recruiter/PM review

industryExposure.minimumIndustries: Students must cover at least 3 industries
datasetRequirements: Event streams (clicks, impressions, conversions), campaign metadata, customer profiles
Social media posts or reviews for NLP tasks
Minimum 3 months of event-level data; >100k events desirable for recommender tasks
dashboardAndAutomationExpectations: Campaign performance dashboard with cohort comparisons and attribution view
Exportable actionable segments and API for marketing automation
Anomaly alerts for sudden CTR/Conversion drops
complianceAndPrivacy: Consent-aware tracking design and cookieless strategies where applicable
Use anonymized or synthetic data for PII-sensitive demonstration
